# ContestOps AI Application Packet

Version: `0.2.0`
Category: AI startup pitch
Deadline: 2026-06-10
Production readiness: 72%

## Application Thesis

ContestOps AI turns opportunity discovery, rule reading, evidence collection, demo packaging, and external submissions into AI-native startup operations.

## Eligibility Gates

- active: AI is core to the product, not an auxiliary feature. Evidence: `docs/PRODUCT_AI_PROPOSED.md`.
- applicant_input: Total funding raised to date is below EUR 10M. Evidence: `docs/ELIGIBILITY_CHECKLIST.md`.
- applicant_input: Company is a registered legal entity. Evidence: `submission/dealum_payload.json`.
- applicant_input: Team has at least two members or two dedicated cofounders. Evidence: `docs/ELIGIBILITY_CHECKLIST.md`.
- applicant_input: Startup is pre-seed, seed, or Series A. Evidence: `submission/dealum_payload.json`.
- active: Live product or strong MVP exists. Evidence: `docs/PRODUCT_AI_PROPOSED.md`.
- planned: Early traction or strong validation is packaged. Evidence: `docs/TRACTION_PROOF_MINIMUM.md`.
- applicant_input: At least one founder can attend finals in Paris. Evidence: `docs/ELIGIBILITY_CHECKLIST.md`.
- active: Dealum application payload and field map are ready. Evidence: `submission/dealum_payload.json`.

## Milestones

- 0.1.0: Opportunity research and source lock (2026-05-29, done).
- 0.2.0: Application packet generator (2026-05-29, active).
- 0.4.0: Demo panel and evidence ledger (2026-05-30, planned).
- 0.7.0: Dealum draft automation (2026-05-31, planned).
- 0.9.0: Founder review and final media (2026-06-01, planned).
- 1.0.0: RAISE application submitted (2026-06-10, planned).
